subject: [SDC] Update SDC to 1.8.5
commit_message:
[SDC] Update SDC to 1.8.5

Bugfixes only for Honolulu RC2 including

SDC-3557
SDC-3551
SDC-3545
SDC-3533
SDC-3528

Issue-ID: SDC-3555
Signed-off-by: ChrisC <christophe.closset@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: Ie48ae7e04a755f84831b7f436a6c4ddbf14e4b8c
